overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's urban streets at night. The character progresses from an open sidewalk with construction scaffolding, under a massive concrete overpass, and into a long covered corridor with distinctive vertical lighting panels.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with construction scaffolding and parked vehicles

events.description: character walks into the shadow of the overpass, reducing ambient light significantly

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange tactile sidewalk toward the overpass, passing parked cars and metal scaffolding

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink jacket walking ahead of the character toward the overpass

entered.detail: distinctive bright orange textured pedestrian walkway with geometric diamond patterns
metal scaffolding with green safety netting covering the building facade
massive concrete overpass structure spanning the street with red warning lights
futuristic white and dark vehicles parked along the curb
tall yellow poles with overhead lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a distinctive orange tactile sidewalk in a futuristic urban setting. Metal scaffolding with green netting lines the left side while parked cars sit along the curb. The character approaches a massive concrete overpass ahead, passing under its shadow as the lighting dims significantly around the 15-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass with concrete pillars

events.description: enters the covered area beneath the overpass with massive concrete support pillars
approaches crosswalk under the overpass with vehicles passing on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass, navigating through increased pedestrian traffic and passing concrete support columns

notable_agents.action: child in green jacket walking alongside an adult in the same direction

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete columns supporting the overpass structure overhead
illuminated holographic street sign indicating direction to Vista Del Rey district
scattered garbage bags and discarded items accumulated along the wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves into the shadowy environment beneath the overpass, surrounded by massive concrete pillars. The lighting becomes significantly darker with only artificial illumination. Pedestrian density increases as the character approaches a crosswalk, passing a holographic sign for Vista Del Rey. Trash and debris line the left wall near the scaffolding exit point.

scene_state.functional_zone: long covered pedestrian corridor with vertical light installations

events.description: enters long covered corridor with distinctive vertical light panels illuminating the left wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit corridor, passing pedestrians and observing the vertical light installations on the left wall

entered.detail: tall rectangular illuminated panels emitting bright white-green light along the corridor wall
holographic navigation sign indicating direction to Corpo Plaza with orange text
holographic navigation sign indicating direction to City Center with orange text

segments.scene_description: The character enters a long, enclosed corridor illuminated by striking vertical light panels on the left wall. The environment is completely covered with no sky visibility, creating a tunnel-like atmosphere. Holographic directional signs for Corpo Plaza and City Center appear on the left as the character continues walking, encountering pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic urban street that transitions from an open sidewalk into a dark, enclosed corridor. It begins with the character walking along an orange tactile sidewalk lined with green-netted scaffolding and parked cars, moving steadily toward a massive concrete overpass. As the camera passes under the overpass, the natural light vanishes and the environment shifts into a shadowy zone dominated by heavy concrete pillars, scattered debris, and a holographic Vista Del Rey sign. The scene then flows seamlessly into a long, covered tunnel where the open sky is replaced by a ceiling and striking vertical light panels. Finally, the camera advances through this enclosed space past holographic directional signs for Corpo Plaza and City Center while weaving through oncoming pedestrians.
